title: cephalanthus tetrandrus
intro: Cephalanthus tetrandrus, also known as Buttonbush, is a shrub native to North America, characterized by its distinctive spherical flower heads. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Buttonbush include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Buttonbush can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the dried flowers and leaves being commonly used in herbal remedies.
